column1: # Toned pinyin (with diacritical marks) for common CJK Unified Ideographs.
# Covers the ~3000 most common characters (HSK 1-6 + high-frequency).
# Tone marks follow standard pinyin rules:
#   1st tone: macron (ā, ē, ī, ō, ū, ǖ)
#   2nd tone: acute (á, é, í, ó, ú, ǘ)
#   3rd tone: caron (ǎ, ě, ǐ, ǒ, ǔ, ǚ)
#   4th tone: grave (à, è, ì, ò, ù, ǜ)
